# services.dunst

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dunst`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dunst.configFile` | `null or string or absolute path` | Path to the configuration file read by dunst. |
| `services.dunst.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the dunst notification daemon. |
| `services.dunst.iconTheme` | `submodule` | Set the icon theme. |
| `services.dunst.package` | `package` | The dunst package to use. |
| `services.dunst.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of attribute set of (string or boolean or signed integer or list of string)` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/dunst/dunstrc . |
| `services.dunst.waylandDisplay` | `string` | Set the service’s WAYLAND_DISPLAY environment variable. |
